current_execution_contract_20260717.request_sampling: HTTP temperature/top_p/top_k/seed are not consumed by the DG denoise loop; use explicit process-level DG settings.
current_execution_contract_20260717.eos: ignore_eos=true is a transport stress control that exposes the physical post-EOS canvas tail; never use it for a quality verdict.
current_execution_contract_20260717.metrics: Use DG_VLLM_METRIC prefill/denoise/commit/block fields and 256/block_latency. API completion_tokens/wall_time includes EOS trimming and queueing.
current_execution_contract_20260717.prefill: DG_PREFILL_RAGGED_LONG defaults on and processes prompts above 4096 in 4096-token ragged top-8 slices. Current pure-prefill evidence is doc/optimize_perf/context_window_prefill_only_chunkedlong_20260713_msl65536.json at 233b88276ab; the artifact without chunkedlong is the superseded dense-fallback control.
current_execution_contract_20260717.trace: Growing contiguous-prefix shapes recapture across blocks. July-10 same-ID rows used prompt-only prefix visibility and are historical.
current_execution_contract_20260717.served_context: HF advertises 262144. Standalone model-owned 256K fit evidence exists, but current live vLLM serving is not validated end-to-end at 262144; do not advertise a live served ceiling from allocation evidence alone.

max_model_len_provenance: HF config text_config.max_position_embeddings = 262144 (256K). Equals canvas_length(256) * max_blocks(1024). This is the capacity limit for prompt + generated, NOT a requirement that prompts be 262144 tokens (HF DiffusionGemmaGenerationMixin.generate computes max_length = input_len + max_new_tokens).

max_model_len_physical_limit_evidence.device: QB2 / bh-qbge-06 / P150x4 (2 Blackhole PCIe cards, 4 Tensix, TP=4, (1,4) mesh)
max_model_len_physical_limit_evidence.fit: Full 30-layer 26B-A4B build + 256K KV caches allocate on the (1,4) mesh: post-build DRAM 29.704 GiB/chip used, 2.163 GiB/chip free (plan.md 2026-07-02 full-depth 256K probe).
max_model_len_physical_limit_evidence.sampler_constraint: Full-vocab (262144) on-device Gumbel/noise materialization OOMs in the fragmented DRAM remaining after 256K-KV allocation (ttnn.rand asks for ~1 GiB; largest free block ~101 MiB/bank). The chunked/no-materialize Gumbel sampler (tt/sampling.py::gumbel_max_with_chunked_noise, --chunked-gumbel-sampling) fits full-depth 256K + canvas_length=256: DG_TEXT_DEMO_SUCCESS at 29.704 GiB/chip used.
max_model_len_physical_limit_evidence.verdict: 262144 is the HF-advertised prompt+generated capacity and has standalone model-owned fit evidence. It is not a currently validated live-vLLM served ceiling. Live serving must state the tested max_model_len separately; full 256K requires the memory-bounded chunked-Gumbel sampler and additional vLLM admission/memory validation.

output_block_granularity.note: DiffusionGemma emits a 256-token BLOCK per decode step (one denoised+committed canvas), not one token. This is the OUTPUT block granularity; it is intrinsic to block-diffusion generation and is NOT an input-alignment constraint.
output_block_granularity.input_alignment: Prompt length may be any valid length up to max_model_len. There is no requirement that prompt length be divisible by 256, by a prefill tile (32), by block_size, or by a page. prefill_prompt_tokens pads the prompt to a 32-tile multiple internally and reports the logical/aligned lengths; the intrinsic 256-token output block granularity does not constrain the prompt length.

datatype_policy.source: dg-07 datatype sweep RUN 2026-07-08 (doc/datatype_sweep/). One reduction evaluated: MoE experts bf16 -> bfloat8_b. REJECTED on diffusion-decision fidelity (committed clean-argmax agreement 0.227, entropy PCC 0.631, accept IoU 0.501 vs the bf16 reference). Shipping policy keeps BF16 weights and the established decision arithmetic; production self-conditioning and entropy are BF16 as detailed below.
datatype_policy.ccl: ttnn.bfloat16 (backbone TP=4 all-reduce/all-gather via gemma4 CCL)
datatype_policy.self_conditioning: ttnn.bfloat16 tensors and weights. The production 262144-vocab soft embedding uses the numerically stable, ordered 8192-vocab online-softmax path in tt/self_conditioning.py. That chunked branch currently does not forward default_self_conditioning_compute_kernel_config; do not infer fp32 accumulation from the accepted argument. The dg-08 prechunk and logits-L1 optimizations change storage/copy placement only and preserve this selected BF16 arithmetic exactly.
datatype_policy.matches_gemma4_vllm_bridge: Yes — bf16 weights + bf16 KV cache. bf16 experts are now selected on FIDELITY grounds (bfp8 fits and is faster but fails the diffusion-decision gate); fp32 experts also do not fit and fp32 router top-k is blocked by ttnn.topk TT_FATAL.
datatype_policy.experts_bfp8_evaluated: bfp8 experts FIT (post-build 7.830 GiB/chip, frees 5.44 GiB vs bf16 13.268) and are ~6-9% faster traced, but change ~77% of committed tokens vs bf16 and collapse entropy PCC to 0.631 (min 0.036). Rejected on fidelity, not fit. DG-local knob DG_EXPERTS_BFP8 landed OFF-by-default for reuse if #48291 creates headroom.

self_conditioning_embedding_storage.previous_layout: one persistent 1408 MiB DRAM tensor; each denoise step copied 32 sequential 44 MiB slices
self_conditioning_embedding_storage.selected_layout: 32 persistent 44 MiB DRAM tensors; same ordered 8192-row chunks and same 1408 MiB payload
self_conditioning_embedding_storage.selector: DG_SELFCOND_PRECHUNK_EMBED defaults enabled; set 0 only for the diagnostic previous-layout control

full_depth_256k_final_default_probe.mode: eager full 48-step production chunked-Gumbel serving smoke; sparse tuned BF16 MoE; prechunk selector unset/resolved enabled
full_depth_256k_final_default_probe.result: DG_VLLM_SERVING_SMOKE_SUCCESS; all 48 denoise steps completed; one 256-token block emitted; final_next_pos=288; clean teardown

traced_256k_limit.status: not currently composable with the full-vocab entropy live set at max context
traced_256k_limit.zero_trace_reservation: model/adapter operations fit, but end_trace_capture reports trace-buffer overlap at the DRAM high-water mark
traced_256k_limit.failure: reserving enough trace space removes the contiguous 128 MiB buffer needed by token_entropy exp_shifted/expected_terms; exact allocator OOMs are recorded in doc/optimize_perf/selfcond_prechunk.md
traced_256k_limit.contract: The advertised 256K model capability is freshly proven with the eager production memory-bounded chunked-Gumbel sampler for the full 48-step budget. Production chunked-Gumbel Metal Trace is independently verified on the full 30-layer 1024-allocation path at K=48 across two growing-prefix blocks: 48 traces per prefix shape, 96 captured/96 executed total, 1.42 output tok/s including block-1 recapture. This does not remove the recorded traced-256K allocator conflict; no max_model_len reduction was made.

self_conditioning_logits_placement.selected_layout: Each dynamic 8192-vocabulary logits slice, its immediate subtract/exp, denominator reduction, and ordered denominator accumulator use interleaved L1. The 32 chunk matmuls, ordered numerator accumulator, and final division remain in DRAM.
self_conditioning_logits_placement.selector: DG_SELFCOND_LOGITS_L1 defaults to chain; set off only for the diagnostic DRAM-placement control
self_conditioning_logits_placement.arithmetic_contract: No dtype, input value, chunk boundary, matmul shape, operation boundary, or accumulation order changes.
self_conditioning_logits_placement.decision_gate: 48/48 exact across argmax, sampled ids, BF16 entropy, accept mask, renoised canvas, commit candidate, and final commit under both RUN-first argmax and production ChunkedGumbelNoise

full_depth_256k_probe.mode: eager full 48-step production chunked-Gumbel serving smoke; sparse tuned BF16 MoE; prechunk enabled and logits-L1 chain explicit
full_depth_256k_probe.result: DG_VLLM_SERVING_SMOKE_SUCCESS; all 48 denoise steps completed; one 256-token block emitted; final_next_pos=288; clean teardown

mesh.max_num_seqs_note: Batch-1 single-user latency is the headline target. Larger batch/concurrency (up to 32) is bounded by the 256K-KV per-request footprint; the block-diffusion per-step canvas K/V scratch (#47474 storage class ii) is additional per-request memory. Record the largest tested max_num_seqs in the serving evidence.

sampling.mode: on-device canvas sampling (sample_on_device_mode=all). No full-logits readback. The eager diagnostic loop can read compact per-step decision tensors ([B,L] argmax/entropy/sampled/accept); traced argmax/materialized/chunked-Gumbel paths keep canvas feedback device-resident and read only the final clean commit candidate.
sampling.procedure: Per denoise step: temperature-scale (linear 0.8->0.4) -> Gumbel-max argmax(logits/T + gumbel) -> entropy-budget acceptance (sort/cumsum/scatter) -> renoise rejected positions to random tokens. Commit = clean argmax. RUN-first: --argmax-sampling routes clean argmax (gumbel_noise=None) to avoid full-vocab noise allocation at 256K.
sampling.optimize_perf_47465: Terminal decision path is trace-safe and optimized (decisions unchanged): argmax over the 262144 vocab uses ROW_MAJOR multi-core; accept/renoise constants are preallocated outside capture; the fixed <=48-step trace keeps canvas feedback on device. The ~4176 ms step / ~232 s block values in the original #47465 evidence are historical. The earlier selected-default RUN-first argmax evidence in selfcond_logits_l1_e2e.json held the prefix at the initial prompt and is performance provenance only. Production chunked-Gumbel tracing uses a persistent device seed plus one reusable 1024-vocab uniform buffer and is validated full-depth at K=48/max_seq_len=1024 with correct growing-prefix visibility: block 1 including recapture is 180.816 s / 1.416 output tok/s. Dynamic Gumbel requires one-step trace windows; eliminating per-block prefix recapture requires paged/fixed-shape inputs; traced 256K remains separately blocked by the recorded allocator conflict.
